sql_array: CREATE TABLE spatial_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY NOT NULL, data TEXT);
SELECT id, rstmtexec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spatial_data WHERE bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 1 1, 0 1, 0 0))'))') AS overlap_count FROM spatial_data WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, rstmtexec('SELECT AVG(id) FROM spatial_data WHERE bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 1 1, 1 0, 0 0))'))') AS avg_id FROM spatial_data GROUP BY id HAVING avg_id > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT geom FROM spatial_data WHERE bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 1 1, 0 1, 0 0))')) AND rstmtexec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spatial_data WHERE id > 0') = 1;
SELECT id, NULLIF(rstmtexec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spatial_data'), 0) AS non_zero_count FROM spatial_data GROUP BY id HAVING non_zero_count IS NOT NULL;

WITH filtered AS (SELECT id, geom FROM spatial_data WHERE data LIKE '%Sample%') SELECT rstmtexec('SELECT SUM(id) FROM filtered') AS total FROM filtered WHERE bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 1 1, 0 1, 0 0))'));
SELECT rstmtexec('SELECT MIN(id) FROM spatial_data WHERE geom IS NOT NULL AND ST_Area(geom) > 0') AS min_id;
CREATE TABLE tmp_table AS SELECT geom, rstmtexec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spatial_data WHERE bif:st_overlaps(geom, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 2 2, 2 0, 0 0))'))') AS overlap_count FROM spatial_data;
